Start where you are

Find the right Canadian student role faster

Skip generic job boards. Hanzilla organizes fresh early-career roles by application intent: internships, co-ops, new grad jobs, fields, and Canadian cities.

🎓 Internships & co-ops Summer, fall, winter, and co-op work terms for students still in school. 🚀 New grad & entry-level Junior, new graduate, rotational, analyst, trainee, and first full-time roles in Canada. 💼 Finance & accounting Analyst, banking, accounting, actuarial, audit, risk, and capital markets roles. ⚙️ Engineering Mechanical, electrical, civil, industrial, environmental, and manufacturing roles. 📈 Business & operations Marketing, sales, HR, consulting, project, supply chain, and coordinator jobs. 🔬 Sciences Lab, biotech, chemistry, environmental science, geoscience, and research roles. 📝 Arts & humanities Communications, policy, research, nonprofit, education, culture, and writing roles. 💻 Tech & software Software, data, security, QA, product, IT, hardware, and startup roles.

Why this exists

Student job search in Canada is too fragmented

Roles are scattered across company career pages, school portals, LinkedIn, niche boards, and spreadsheets. Hanzilla pulls early-career opportunities into one student-first directory and keeps stale roles out of the main listings.

Canada-specificCity pages for Toronto, Vancouver, Montreal, Waterloo, Ottawa, Calgary, remote Canada, and more.
Across fieldsNot just CS: finance, engineering, business, sciences, arts/humanities, tech, and emerging categories.
Daily updatedFresh listings, structured pages, direct apply links, and schema for search discovery.
No matches on this page. Try a broader keyword or switch between New grad and Internships above.

Frequently Asked Questions

How often are new jobs added?

Our job listings are updated daily at 09:00 UTC. We use automated pipelines to fetch fresh positions across tech, finance, and other industries from across Canada, ensuring you see the latest opportunities.

What types of jobs are listed?

We cover entry-level, junior, co-op, internship, and new grad roles for Canadian university students across multiple fields: tech, finance, engineering, business, sciences, arts/humanities, and more. The homepage is designed as an all-fields student jobs board, with field-specific pages available for deeper browsing.

Are these jobs only for Canadian citizens?

Most positions are open to candidates with valid Canadian work authorization. Some employers sponsor work permits. Check individual job listings for specific requirements.

How do I apply for a job?

Click on any job listing to see full details, then click 'Apply Now' to be redirected to the company's official application page. We don't handle applications directly.

What industries and cities do you cover?

Hanzilla Jobs covers student and recent-grad opportunities across Canada, including tech, finance, engineering, business, sciences, arts/humanities, and other early-career tracks. Listings span Toronto, Vancouver, Montreal, Ottawa, Calgary, Waterloo, and remote Canada roles.

Updated daily at 09:00 UTC.
